rationale: The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). Elec. Code §254.033 governs reporting of uncompensated personal services as political contributions. The two provisions address unrelated subject matter.
quote: A political contribution consisting of an individual's personal service is not required to be reported under this chapter if the individual receives no compensation for the service.
_note: No overlap between proposed property-tax change and election-code reporting rule.
